title: Influences on the curriculum
summary: 9699 — who controls the curriculum, hidden curriculum, and ideological influences on knowledge.
learningObjectives: Analyse government, employers, and interest groups' influence.
Evaluate Marxist and New Right views of curriculum content.
Assess cultural bias in subject selection and textbooks.

simpleExplanation.title: What gets taught — and why
simpleExplanation.summary: The official curriculum reflects power struggles over which knowledge counts; the hidden curriculum teaches conformity and hierarchy.
steps: Gendered and ethnocentric bias in content.

sections.content: **Curriculum influences** (5.3) completes Topic 5. Contrast **Apple**, **Young**, and **Ball** on knowledge control.
